name: Yogyakarta (Special Region of Indonesia)
description: A navy field charged at the centre with the Praja Cihna — the emblem of the Yogyakarta Sultanate.
history: Used by the Special Region of Yogyakarta (Daerah Istimewa Yogyakarta), Indonesia's only constitutional monarchy where the Sultan of Yogyakarta is also the Governor.

features.role: Praja Cihna — the emblem of the Yogyakarta Sultanate
features.symbolism: the royal symbol containing the monogram 'HB' (Hamengkubuwono) within the kraton (palace) emblem
